subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy sublime and eloquent ode was received. The verses flowed like running water, and the lines were surpassing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان غزل بلیغ فصیح ملاحظه گردید اشعار مانند آب روان بود و ابیات فائق
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @music and singing, @mystical themes
